title: grove init --as mcp-llm — local-LLM delegated exploration (mcp__grove__explore)
goal: Add `grove init --as mcp-llm`: a pure-Rust inner explorer (OpenAI-compat client; Ollama default, llama.cpp supported) exposed as the ONLY MCP tool (mcp__grove__explore) via a new grove serve mode; a full-screen setup TUI (also re-launchable via `grove config`) collecting provider/URL/model/mode/allowed-bash-tools; three steering modes (standard=merit, balanced=plan-execute, aggressive=grove-first); idempotent CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md steering routing exploration through __explore; startup health probe with runtime connection errors shutting the server down.
description: Productizes the local-delegation sidebench findings (code-analyzer-testbench/studies/fastcontext-sidebench: ~16-18x mean total-metered-context reduction at grounding parity). Decisions D1-D6 resolved in intake: pure Rust (no Python, no fastcontext naming), OpenAI-compat transport, startup probe + fail-fast shutdown, solid TUI + grove config verb, exclusive explore-only tool surface, functional correctness only (benchmarks post-impl). Requirements: engineering/sprints/GROVE-S02/SPRINT_REQUIREMENTS.md. Plan: engineering/sprints/GROVE-S02/SPRINT_PLAN.md.
